context.usage: Default visible state when no care interaction is active.

silhouette_notes: Crest (yellow) is a 3px-tall shape above the head.
Cheek patch is a solid blob using #FF004D; no dithering.
Tail extends down-right by 6-8px and stays inside 40x40 bounds.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 160x40px (4 frames × 40x40) with 0px spacing.
Idle loop at 2fps includes a blink where eyes close to a 1px line for exactly 1 frame.
All edges are pixel-perfect with no anti-aliasing; only listed colors and transparency are used.
shared_properties: Echo keeps crest, cheek patch, beak, and tail readable in every occupied frame.
Body footprint stays inside 40x40px and remains centered near x44 y42.
Core palette fields stay fixed at primary #1D2B53, background #FFF1E8, and accent #FF004D.
differences: This asset is the base character state for downstream Echo variants.
Idle timing uses 4 frames at 2fps with one blink moment.
Pose centers Echo as the default focal point of the cage scene.

reference_images.label: cockatiel_reference_photo
reference_images.purpose: Grounds Echo's cockatiel silhouette, crest posture, cheek patch placement, and beak anatomy for this behavior state.

reference_images.label: pico_8_topic_art
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 128x128 PICO-8-like framing and tiny-pet composition used by this behavior state.

reference_images.label: pixel_art_topic_art
reference_images.purpose: Grounds crisp pixel clustering, flat shading, and one-pixel readability for this behavior state.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle with TextureAtlasLayout and a fixed-step animation timer.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load through AssetServer in the Loading state and store the handle plus atlas layout in a typed resource before gameplay starts.
runtime_notes: Advance atlas indices with deterministic timers that match specs.animation.fps.
Snap transforms to whole pixels before render extraction.
Keep collision or input logic separate from the art bundle so care tuning remains flexible.
